content:
1 hour ago

--

In a nutshell:
RAP (RESTful ABAP Programming Model) = Build backend business services in the ABAP stack (S/4HANA or ABAP Cloud).
CAP (Cloud Application Programming Model) = Build backend business services using Node.js or Java, primarily for the SAP SAP Business Technology Platform.
Both let you:
Define a data model.
Expose it as OData services.
Implement CRUD operations.
Add business validations and determinations.
Handle actions/functions.
Write queries and filtering.
Manage authorization.
Support drafts (where applicable).
Consume the service from UI applications like SAP Fiori.
